claim: CROSS-CHECK CONFIRMED: YOLO demand evidence dispatch implements boundary audit with before/after snapshots, mutation detection, BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blocker injection, and PRD blocking. All 15 explorer evidence citations are accurate with correct paths and line numbers.

evidence.summary: CONFIRMED: gitFiles() runs 'git ls-files -co --exclude-standard -z' exactly as claimed by explorer
evidence.why: Independent read confirms git-backed file discovery implementation matches explorer citation

evidence.summary: CONFIRMED: buildBoundarySnapshot() uses gitFiles() with walkFiles() fallback, excludes allowedRoots, computes SHA-256 digests as claimed
evidence.why: Independent verification of hybrid git/non-git strategy and artifact exclusion logic

evidence.summary: CONFIRMED: diffBoundarySnapshots() compares before/after maps, detects added/modified/deleted files, returns sorted changes as claimed
evidence.why: Mutation detection logic verified to match explorer description exactly

evidence.summary: CONFIRMED: runDemandEvidenceDispatchRuntime() captures boundaryBefore (line 511) and boundaryAfter (line 561), diffs them (line 562), builds BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blockers (lines 580-585) as claimed
evidence.why: Independent read confirms boundary audit integration matches explorer's full claim

evidence.summary: CONFIRMED: Boundary blockers injected into readiness.blockers array, forcing prd_ready=false when violations detected
evidence.why: Verifies PRD blocking mechanism works as explorer described

evidence.summary: CONFIRMED: execution_policy.boundary sets project_mutation: 'forbidden' and allowed_write_roots to artifact directory as claimed
evidence.why: Policy contract for boundary enforcement verified to match explorer citation

evidence.summary: CONFIRMED: Test writes unexpected-project-write.txt, expects blocked status with BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION, checks result.boundary.project_mutation === 'violated' as claimed
evidence.why: Independent test read confirms tracked mutation detection and blocker behavior

evidence.summary: CONFIRMED: Test inits git repo, writes untracked-mutation.txt, expects violation with change path 'untracked-mutation.txt' and BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blocker as claimed
evidence.why: Untracked mutation detection verified to match explorer description

evidence.summary: CONFIRMED: Production dispatch artifact shows boundary object with project_mutation: 'clean', allowed_write_roots array, and empty changes array as claimed
evidence.why: Real-world artifact confirms boundary audit runs and reports status in production

evidence.summary: CONFIRMED: inspectDemandPrdReadiness() iterates requiredEvidenceAgents, checks evidenceResultComplete(), calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues() for each result as claimed
evidence.why: PRD readiness logic that processes evidence agent results verified

evidence.summary: CONFIRMED: evidenceResultBlockingIssues() checks recommendation, verdict, missing array, status codes to determine if agent result blocks PRD readiness as claimed
evidence.why: Blocker determination logic verified to match explorer description

evidence.summary: CONFIRMED: spawnProviderPrompt() spawns provider commands with configured tool restrictions and permissions, returns structured run result as claimed
CONFIRMED: executionConfig() normalizes agent tool profiles (boundary/research/full), handles allowFullAgentTools flag, configures claude-specific tool restriction flags as claimed
evidence.why: Tool profile gating that controls agent write capabilities verified

evidence.summary: CONFIRMED: Explorer agent result cites 8 evidence items with paths (src/demand/evidence-dispatch.ts, __tests__/demand-evidence-dispatch.test.ts) and line numbers as claimed
evidence.why: Evidence agent output pattern verified with path citations and line numbers

evidence.summary: CONFIRMED: Verifier agent independently validates all 8 explorer evidence citations with VERIFIED prefixes, confirming path and line accuracy as claimed
evidence.why: Cross-check verification pattern confirmed from previous dispatch run

risks: git ls-files behavior may vary across git versions or platforms affecting boundary detection (noted by explorer, not a blocker)
walkFiles() fallback may miss platform-specific excluded patterns in non-git projects (noted by explorer, not a blocker)
No test evidence for boundary behavior in truly non-git projects (noted by explorer as gap)
No stress-test evidence using real Claude -p agents in dirty working trees (noted by explorer as gap)
No test for edge cases: large file counts, binary files, permission errors during digest (noted by explorer as gap)
missing: No test evidence for boundary behavior in truly non-git projects (walkFiles fallback)
No stress-test evidence using real Claude -p agents in dirty working trees
No test for edge cases: large file counts, binary files, permission errors during digest

result.notes: All 15 explorer evidence citations independently confirmed as accurate. No conflicts found. Boundary audit implementation (before/after snapshots, mutation detection, BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blocker injection, PRD blocking, test validation, evidence agent path citations) is verified by project-scoped evidence with exact paths and line numbers. Missing items are gap items, not blockers.
